= [[Emojis]] =
Icons for [[Chat]].

[[File:Emoji_icon1.png|frameless|75x75px]]Snail Emoji Picker
[[File:Emoji_icon2.png|frameless|75x75px]]Bird Emoji Picker
[[File:Emoji_icon3.png|frameless|75x75px]]Athena Emoji Picker
[[File:Emoji_icon4.png|frameless|75x75px]]Toad Emoji Picker
[[File:Emoji_icon5.png|frameless|75x75px]]Red Riding Hood Emoji Picker

===Default ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_01}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_02}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_03}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_04}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_05}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_06}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_07}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_08}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_09}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_10}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_11}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_12}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_13}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_14}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_15}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_16}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_17}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_18}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_19}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_20}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_21}}
|}

===[[Shining Athena]] ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_101}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_102}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_103}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_104}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_105}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_106}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_107}}
|}

===[[Hatchery]] ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_201}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_202}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_203}}
|}

===QCPlay Payment Center ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1301}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1302}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1303}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1304}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1305}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1306}}
|}

==Unavailable Content==

{{Template:Unavailable Content}}

=== 301 - 310 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_301}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_302}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_303}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_304}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_305}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_306}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_307}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_308}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_309}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_310}}
|}

=== 501 - 508 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_501}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_502}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_503}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_504}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_505}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_506}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_507}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_508}}
|}

=== 601 - 608 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_601}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_602}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_603}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_604}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_605}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_606}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_607}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_608}}
|}

=== 701 - 708 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_701}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_702}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_703}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_704}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_705}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_706}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_707}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_708}}
|}

=== 801 - 808 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_801}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_802}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_803}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_804}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_805}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_806}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_807}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_808}}
|}

=== 901 - 908 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_901}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_902}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_903}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_904}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_905}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_906}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_907}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_908}}
|}

=== 1001 - 1008 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1001}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1002}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1003}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1004}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1005}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1006}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1007}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1008}}
|}

=== 1101 - 1112 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1101}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1102}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1103}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1104}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1105}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1106}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1107}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1108}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1109}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1110}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1111}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1112}}
|}

=== 1201 - 1203 ===

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1201}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1202}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|emoji_1203}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
